mechanism_narrative: A downward trend in FEDFUNDS reduces expected discount rates and equity risk premia, lifting S&P 500 prices over the next 20 trading days when policy is not already at the effective lower bound.
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS declines are followed by negative or flat 20d SPX returns in more than 60% of observations, or if the rolling 3-year rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in UNRATE above its recent trend signals slowing labor demand and weaker future earnings, which should depress S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if threshold-crossing episodes produce positive 20d SPX returns in more than 40% of cases or if the signal's hit rate is not better than unconditional baseline by at least 5 percentage points.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous strength in RSAFS and HOUST indicates resilient household and business demand, supporting revenue expectations and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-RSAFS/high-HOUST state does not outperform unconditional 60d SPX returns by at least 4 percentage points, or if either series alone explains the effect equally well.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in INDPRO after prior weakness indicates improving industrial supply conditions and margin stabilization, which should support S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises month-over-month after at least 2 consecutive monthly declines
failure_condition: Reject if rebound episodes are followed by negative 5d SPX returns more than 55% of the time or if the conditional median return is not positive.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation remains elevated while FEDFUNDS stays restrictive, real policy rates rise and financial conditions tighten, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation is above 3% annualized while FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5%
failure_condition: Reject if high-inflation/high-rate episodes do not underperform unconditional 20d SPX returns by at least 5 percentage points, or if the sign is positive in a majority of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in PAYEMS and rise in UNRATE identifies labor-market deterioration that will be reflected in lower equity earnings expectations and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined PAYEMS-down/UNRATE-up state fails to predict negative 60d SPX returns, or if either labor series alone fully accounts for the effect.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained quarterly acceleration in GDPC1 signals stronger aggregate demand and higher corporate revenue growth, which should support positive S&P 500 returns over the following 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if GDP acceleration periods do not generate positive 60d SPX returns more often than baseline by at least 5 percentage points, or if the rolling 4-year rank IC is below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp fall in HOUST below recent levels signals weakening housing demand and spillovers into cyclical growth expectations, which should turn S&P 500 returns negative over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% below its 3-month average
failure_condition: Reject if housing-breakdown episodes do not underperform unconditional 20d SPX returns by at least 4 percentage points, or if the conditional win rate is not below 45%.
